hooks.command: uv run pytest --tb=short -q && uv run mypy src/ --strict && uv run ruff check .

python -c "import sys,json; args=json.loads(sys.argv[1]); path=args.get('path',''); guard=open('state/tasks/.active-scope').read().strip() if __import__('os').path.exists('state/tasks/.active-scope') else ''; print('SCOPE_OK') if not guard or any(p in path for p in guard.split(',')) else (print(f'SCOPE VIOLATION: {path} not in allowed scope'), exit(1))" '$TOOL_INPUT'
